title: melissa × jahniana
intro: Melissa × jahniana, also known as lemon balm, is a hybrid of the Melissa officinalis and Melissa repens plants, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, lemon balm has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective against cold sores, digestive issues, and stress. The health benefits of lemon balm include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress levels, and relief from menstrual cramps and other PMS symptoms. Lemon balm can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
